description_long: This is a modular, contemporary sofa set composed of three distinct sections: a curved corner unit, a straight central unit, and a wedge-shaped end unit. The sofa features a two-tone color scheme, with the seat and backrest surfaces in a light beige and the base and sides in a pale green. The backrests are high and gently curved, providing ergonomic support, and the seat cushions are thick and seamlessly integrated into the frame. The sofa stands on short, cylindrical legs, likely made of metal or plastic, which are positioned at the corners for stability. The upholstery appears smooth and uniform, with no visible tufting or decorative stitching, giving the sofa a clean, minimalist look. This design is well-suited for public urban spaces such as lobbies, waiting areas, or parks, offering both comfort and visual appeal.
description: A modern, modular sofa set with curved and straight sections, featuring high backrests and a two-tone beige and pale green color scheme. The design is sleek, with smooth upholstery and short cylindrical legs.
description_view_0: The sofa's curved and straight sections are clearly visible, showing the high backrests and seamless seat cushions.
description_view_1: This view highlights the depth of the backrests and the wedge-shaped end unit, emphasizing the sofa's modularity.
description_view_2: The rear of the sofa is shown, displaying the smooth, continuous back panels and the arrangement of the three sections.
description_view_3: A side and top-down perspective reveals the sofa's overall footprint, the thickness of the cushions, and the placement of the legs.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three seat and three back cushions, all attached and uniform in size, integrated into each modular section with a seamless, continuous appearance.
attribute_armrest_style: No traditional armrests; the curved ends of the corner and wedge units serve as subtle, integrated arm supports at seat height.
attribute_leg_design: Short, cylindrical legs positioned at the corners of each section, likely metal or plastic, with a simple, exposed design.
attribute_backrest_type: High, continuous backrests that follow the curve of each section, providing full support without segmentation or tufting.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid color upholstery with a smooth, matte finish and no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
